title: anthemis tenuiloba
intro: Anthemis tenuiloba, commonly known as blue chamomile or pine daisy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which make it effective in soothing digestive issues and calming the nervous system. The health benefits of Anthemis tenuiloba include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia and menstrual cramps. Anthemis tenuiloba can be prepared into teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used for medicinal purposes, and it is also used as a herbal ingredient in skincare products and perfumes.
